original_image_tags: Aged, tan-brown paper document, appearing to be a file cover or separator sheet. The paper shows significant foxing, staining, and wear with a small tear at the bottom edge.

elements.description: Aged, tan-colored paper with two handwritten annotations: one diagonal text string near the top left reading '4/9/75' and a stamped or handwritten string reading 'APR 3 1975' below it. The page shows creases, wear, and a torn bottom edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content being an aged, tan-brown/tan-colored paper document with wear and a torn bottom edge, but Description B adds specific quoted handwritten/stamped text ('4/9/75', 'APR 3 1975') that Description A omits, without contradiction.
